title: Merch Whats the official tracklist of the S2 Works
display_title: Merch Whats the official tracklist of the S2 Works
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] What's the official tracklist of the S2 Works?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Feb 26, 2014 10:41 pm I was wondering if someone could provide me a link to the official tracklist of the S2 works, as in what might be found included with the CDs. Is the one on the Japanese wikipedia or the one on the Evapedia the right now?

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Wed Feb 26, 2014 11:19 pm http://wiki.evageeks.org/S%C2%B2_Works http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Music_of_Neon_Genesis_Evangelion#Neon_Genesis_Evangelion:_S.C2.B2_Works Some good info regarding the set itself in this thread too: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13198/S2-Works-problem/

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Feb 27, 2014 11:46 am Blue Monday wrote: http://wiki.evageeks.org/S%C2%B2_Works http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Music_of_Neon_Genesis_Evangelion#Neon_Genesis_Evangelion:_S.C2.B2_Works Some good info regarding the set itself in this thread too: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13198/S2-Works-problem/

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Thu Feb 27, 2014 5:53 pm I'm a little confused - All these track orders are exactly the same, so are you instead asking for a definitive version on the track names/titles? If so, the Japanese is obviously the original so just run with that then (Which is how they appear in my iTunes anyway, as listed on the Japanese Wikipedia). The ones in English are just translations and variations of. In short; go with whatever tickles your fancy.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri Feb 28, 2014 10:38 am Blue Monday wrote: I'm a little confused - All these track orders are exactly the same, so are you instead asking for a definitive version on the track names/titles? If so, the Japanese is obviously the original so just run with that then (Which is how they appear in my iTunes anyway, as listed on the Japanese Wikipedia). The ones in English are just translations and variations of. In short; go with whatever tickles your fancy.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri Feb 28, 2014 4:31 pm In that case the one listed on the Japanese Wikipedia is the most accurate then because that's how the song titles appear in the booklet that comes with the set IIRC. I'm away from home this weekend but I can verify for you at a later date.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri Feb 28, 2014 6:25 pm Blue Monday wrote: In that case the one listed on the Japanese Wikipedia is the most accurate then because that's how the song titles appear in the booklet that comes with the set IIRC. I'm away from home this weekend but I can verify for you at a later date.
